items.title: pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus
items.author: pewdiepie-archdaemon
items.summary_zh: Odysseus 是一个自托管的 AI 工作空间，让开发者能够在本地部署 AI 工具，无需依赖第三方服务。它提供了类似 Copilot 的代码辅助、自动化任务等功能。对开发者而言，意味着数据隐私更强、定制化程度更高，适合需要离线或安全环境的项目。
items.summary_en: Odysseus is a self-hosted AI workspace that lets developers run AI tools locally, eliminating reliance on third-party services. It offers features like code assistance and task automation. This matters for developers because it ensures data privacy, full customizability, and offline capability—ideal for sensitive or isolated projects.

items.title: unicity-astrid/sdk-js
items.description: JavaScript / TypeScript SDK for building Astrid OS capsules. Companion to unicity-astrid/sdk-rust.
items.author: unicity-astrid
items.summary_zh: 这是一个用于构建 Astrid OS 胶囊的 JavaScript/TypeScript SDK，与 Rust 版 SDK 互补。它简化了在 Astrid 操作系统上开发安全、隔离的应用的过程。开发者可以更轻松地创建跨语言模块，提升开发效率。
items.summary_en: This JavaScript/TypeScript SDK complements the Rust version for building capsules in Astrid OS. It streamlines developing secure, isolated applications on the Astrid operating system. Developers can create cross-language modules more easily, boosting productivity and enabling safer app distribution.

items.title: XiaomiMiMo/MiMo-Code
items.author: XiaomiMiMo
items.summary_zh: MiMo-Code 是小米推出的代码工具，尽管描述缺失，但从项目名推测其可能与代码生成、模型或协作相关。它可能帮助开发者提高编码效率或实现自动化。关注米家生态的开发者可借此探索更多集成可能。
items.summary_en: MiMo-Code is a code-related project from Xiaomi; though the description is missing, the name suggests it might involve code generation, modeling, or collaboration. It could help developers streamline coding or automation. Those in the Xiaomi ecosystem may find integration opportunities.

items.title: alibaba/open-code-review
items.description: Open-source & free — Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.
items.author: alibaba
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴开源的代码审查工具，采用混合架构：确定性流水线结合 LLM Agent，可实现精确的行级代码审查。经阿里大规模验证，免费且开源。开发者可借助此工具自动化审查流程、提升代码质量，减少人工评审负担。
items.summary_en: An open-source, free code review tool from Alibaba, battle-tested at scale. Its hybrid architecture uses deterministic pipelines plus an LLM Agent for precise line-level code review. Developers can automate review processes, improve code quality, and reduce manual effort, making it valuable for teams with large codebases.

items.title: anthropics/defending-code-reference-harness
items.description: Skills for threat modeling, scanning, triage, patching, plus an autonomous scanning harness you can /customize
items.author: anthropics
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 提供的安全技能与自主扫描框架，涵盖威胁建模、扫描、分类、打补丁，并支持自定义。开发者可将此集成到 CI/CD 中，自动化安全检测与修复。对关注 AI 安全的团队尤为重要，能有效降低漏洞风险。
items.summary_en: Anthropic's defending code reference harness includes skills for threat modeling, scanning, triage, and patching, plus an autonomous scanning harness that can be customized. Developers can integrate it into CI/CD to automate security detection and fixes. This is crucial for AI-focused teams to reduce vulnerability risks.

items.title: vercel-labs/zerolang
items.author: vercel-labs
items.summary_zh: Vercel Labs 推出的 ZeroLang 是一种专为智能体设计的编程语言，旨在简化 AI 代理的构建和编排。它让开发者能用声明式语法定义智能体行为、工具调用和上下文管理，从而更高效地开发自主系统。这对构建复杂 AI 应用的开发者意义重大，因为它减少了样板代码，并提供了统一的智能体编程范式。
items.summary_en: ZeroLang by Vercel Labs is a programming language specifically designed for building AI agents. It offers a declarative syntax for defining agent behaviors, tool calls, and context management, enabling developers to create autonomous systems more efficiently. This matters because it reduces boilerplate and provides a unified paradigm for agent-oriented programming, which is critical for developers working on complex AI applications.

items.title: AprilNEA/OpenLogi
items.description: ⚡️A native, local-first alternative to Logitech Options+, written in Rust 🦀 — remap buttons, DPI, and SmartShift over HID++. No account, no telemetry.
items.author: AprilNEA
items.summary_zh: OpenLogi 是一个用 Rust 编写的本地优先替代 Logitech Options+ 的工具，支持通过 HID++ 协议重映射鼠标按钮、调整 DPI 和 SmartShift。它不依赖账户或遥测，完全离线运行，保护用户隐私。对于追求轻量、开源和隐私友好的外设管理方案的开发者来说，这是一个极佳的选择。
items.summary_en: OpenLogi is a Rust-based, local-first alternative to Logitech Options+ that remaps buttons, adjusts DPI, and controls SmartShift via HID++ protocol. It works entirely offline with no accounts or telemetry, preserving privacy. This matters for developers who want a lightweight, open-source, and privacy-respecting tool for managing Logitech peripherals programmatically.

items.title: perplexityai/bumblebee
items.description: Read-only developer endpoint scanner for on-disk package, extension, and developer-tool metadata, built to check exposure to known software supply-chain compromises.
items.author: perplexityai
items.summary_zh: Bumblebee 是一个只读的端点扫描器，专注于检测开发机器上的包、扩展和工具元数据，以评估软件供应链暴露风险。它帮助开发者发现已知漏洞的组件，从而在攻击发生前采取措施。这对维护安全开发环境至关重要，尤其在使用大量第三方依赖的项目中。
items.summary_en: Bumblebee is a read-only endpoint scanner that examines on-disk metadata for packages, extensions, and developer tools to identify potential software supply-chain exposure. It helps developers detect known vulnerable components before they are exploited. This is crucial for maintaining secure development environments, especially in projects with heavy third-party dependencies.

items.title: zgwl/chinese-buy-us-stock-guide
items.author: zgwl
items.summary_zh: 这是一个面向中国投资者的美股投资指南，涵盖开户、交易、税务和风险管理等实用内容。它帮助开发者了解跨境投资的流程与合规要求，尤其适合有海外资产配置需求的技术人员。对于希望拓展国际投资的开发者来说，这是一个实用的入门参考。
items.summary_en: This guide provides Chinese investors with practical information on buying U.S. stocks, covering account setup, trading, taxes, and risk management. It helps developers understand cross-border investment procedures and compliance, which is valuable for those seeking to diversify assets internationally. This matters as it offers a clear, accessible starting point for tech professionals interested in global investing.

items.title: helloianneo/ian-xiaohei-illustrations
items.description: 中文小黑怪诞正文配图生成 Skill | 16:9 白底手绘 | 少量红橙蓝批注 | Codex Skill
items.author: helloianneo
items.summary_zh: 这是一个基于 Codex 的“中文小黑怪诞正文配图生成”技能，用于生成 16:9 白底手绘风格的配图，并附加少量红橙蓝批注。它专为中文内容创作者设计，可快速生成符合正文风格的趣味插图。对开发者而言，这展示了如何利用 AI 技能自动化创作特定风格的视觉内容。
items.summary_en: This Codex-based skill generates 16:9 hand-drawn illustrations with a white background for Chinese articles, featuring dark whimsical characters and minimal red/orange/blue annotations. It automatically creates matching visuals for textual content. For developers, it demonstrates how to leverage AI skills to automate the generation of stylized illustrations, potentially integrating into content pipelines.

items.title: Claude Fable 5
items.author: Philpax
items.summary_zh: Claude Fable 5 是Anthropic最新发布的AI模型，在推理和代码生成方面有显著提升。开发者可借助其更强的上下文理解和指令遵循能力，构建更智能的应用，但需注意模型可能引入新行为偏差。
items.summary_en: Claude Fable 5 is Anthropic's latest AI model with major improvements in reasoning and code generation. Developers can leverage its enhanced context understanding and instruction following to build smarter applications, but should remain aware of potential new behavioral biases.

items.title: Statement on US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.author: Dylan1312
items.summary_zh: 美国政府指令暂停对Fable 5和Mythos 5的访问，凸显AI监管趋严。开发者在选择AI模型时需考虑合规风险，并准备替代方案，以防模型被限制后影响项目进度。
items.summary_en: The US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 underscores tightening AI regulation. Developers must consider compliance risks when choosing AI models and prepare fallback options to avoid project disruptions if models become restricted.

items.title: If you are asking for human attention, demonstrate human effort
items.author: jjfoooo4
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，要求人工关注时应付出人力成本，否则会被视为垃圾信息。这对开发者设计用户通知、客服系统等有重要启发——要避免滥用自动化，确保交互真实可信。
items.summary_en: The article argues that asking for human attention requires demonstrating human effort, or it will be perceived as spam. This insight is crucial for developers designing notification systems and customer interactions: avoid over-automation to maintain authenticity and trust.

items.title: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
items.author: xiaoyu2006
items.summary_zh: 一个AI代理在扫描DN42网络时导致运营者破产，暴露了自动化代理的潜在财务风险。开发者需为AI代理设置硬性预算上限和风险评估机制，防止失控操作造成真实损失。
items.summary_en: An AI agent bankrupted its operator while trying to scan DN42, exposing the financial risks of autonomous agents. Developers must implement hard budget caps and risk assessment mechanisms to prevent runaway operations from causing real-world losses.

items.title: Show HN: Homebrew 6.0.0
items.author: mikemcquaid
items.summary_zh: Homebrew 6.0.0发布，带来性能提升和新特性如并行安装与更好的Apple Silicon支持。作为macOS/Linux主流包管理器，升级可加快开发环境搭建，但也需留意可能的脚本兼容性变化。
items.summary_en: Homebrew 6.0.0 is released with performance improvements and new features like parallel installation and better Apple Silicon support. As the leading package manager for macOS/Linux, this upgrade speeds up development environment setup, though developers should watch for potential script compatibility changes.

items.title: macOS Container Machines
items.author: timsneath
items.summary_zh: macOS Container Machines 探讨了如何在 macOS 上高效运行容器，通过优化虚拟化技术减少资源消耗和启动时间。对开发者而言，这意味着可以更流畅地在本地开发、测试容器化应用，避免传统虚拟机带来的性能瓶颈。
items.summary_en: macOS Container Machines explores efficient container execution on macOS by optimizing virtualization to reduce resource usage and startup times. For developers, this means smoother local development and testing of containerized apps, avoiding the performance overhead of traditional virtual machines.

items.title: Open source AI must win
items.author: vednig
items.summary_zh: Open source AI must win 强调开源模式在人工智能领域的重要性，认为开放模型和数据可避免技术垄断，促进创新和透明度。开发者应关注此趋势，以确保能自由使用、修改和分发 AI 工具，降低依赖风险。
items.summary_en: Open source AI must win highlights the importance of open-source models in AI to prevent monopolization and foster transparency and innovation. Developers should care because it ensures freedom to use, modify, and distribute AI tools, reducing vendor lock-in risks.

items.title: πFS
items.author: helterskelter
items.summary_zh: πFS 是一种新型文件系统，旨在通过独特的数据组织方式提升存储效率和访问速度。对开发者而言，这一创新可能优化大数据处理、云存储应用和嵌入式系统的性能，提供更可靠的数据管理方案。
items.summary_en: πFS is a novel file system designed to improve storage efficiency and access speed through unique data organization. For developers, this innovation could enhance performance in big data processing, cloud storage apps, and embedded systems, offering more reliable data management.

items.title: Making Graphics Like it's 1993
items.author: sklopec
items.summary_zh: Making Graphics Like it's 1993 回顾了 90 年代初期的图形编程技术，如软件渲染和低层次优化。开发者从中可学到性能极限优化的技巧，理解硬件工作原理，对游戏开发、嵌入式图形和复古风格项目有重要启发。
items.summary_en: Making Graphics Like it's 1993 revisits early 1990s graphics programming techniques like software rendering and low-level optimization. Developers can learn extreme performance tuning skills and hardware insights, valuable for game development, embedded graphics, and retro-style projects.

items.title: CRISPR tech selectively shreds cancer cells, including "undruggable" cancers
items.author: gmays
items.summary_zh: CRISPR 技术能够选择性地摧毁癌细胞，包括此前“不可成药”的癌症类型。对开发者而言，这一突破意味着需要在生物信息学、基因数据分析工具和医疗应用中引入精准的算法支持，推动个性化医疗的发展。
items.summary_en: CRISPR tech selectively shreds cancer cells, even targeting previously ‘undruggable’ cancers. For developers, this breakthrough demands precise algorithms for bioinformatics, gene data analysis, and healthcare apps, pushing forward personalized medicine.
